postCreateCommand: sudo chown -R vscode:vscode /home/vscode/.kube && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y gh && git config --global credential.helper gh && /usr/local/bin/mise trust /workspaces/$DEVPOD_WORKSPACE_ID/mise.toml && /usr/local/bin/mise install && /usr/local/bin/mise reshim && sudo curl -Lo /usr/local/bin/kubens https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ahmetb/kubectx/master/kubens && sudo chmod +x /usr/local/bin/kubens && sudo mkdir -p /home/vscode/.kube/kubens && sudo chown vscode:vscode /home/vscode/.kube/kubens
